mapper.select: select * from check_in_summary where user_id = #{userId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into check_in_record ( user_id, check_in_date, plan_completed_count, plan_total_count, study_duration_minutes ) values ( #{userId}, #{checkInDate}, #{planCompletedCount}, #{planTotalCount}, #{studyDurationMinutes} )
insert into check_in_summary ( user_id, consecutive_days, total_days, last_success_date ) values ( #{userId}, #{consecutiveDays}, #{totalDays}, #{lastSuccessDate} )

insert into check_in_fail_record ( user_id, check_in_date, attempt_count, latest_reason, plan_completed_count, plan_total_count, study_duration_minutes, last_attempt_time ) values ( #{userId}, #{checkInDate}, #{attemptCount}, #{latestReason}, #{planCompletedCount}, #{planTotalCount}, #{studyDurationMinutes}, #{lastAttemptTime} ) on duplicate key update attempt_count = attempt_count + 1, latest_reason = values(latest_reason), plan_completed_count = values(plan_completed_count), plan_total_count = values(plan_total_count), study_duration_minutes = values(study_duration_minutes), last_attempt_time = values(last_attempt_time)
